steps.title: Identify two points on the line of best fit
steps.content: From the graph, the line passes through approximately (0, 12) on the y-axis and (10, 1).

steps.title: Calculate the slope
steps.content:
Apply the slope formula: $$m = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1} = \frac{1 - 12}{10 - 0} = \frac{-11}{10} = -1.1$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
